title: Opinion: Opinion | Can A Gen Z-Influencer-Rapper PM Really 'Change' Nepal?
summary_full: Observers say it's high time the former mayor evolved and grew, as well as became more mature, diplomatic and friendly with journalists, opponents and, most importantly, friendly neighbours like India and China.
